{{CargoRelic
|name=Lost Friend
|class_id=20498
|rank=Green
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=In this photograph, it captures Snail and Komugi in their early lives. When they were together, they would often take out this photo to reminisce about the beautiful moments of the past.
|fame=31
|art=15
|fth=14
|civ=16
|tech=14
|ss1=In explorations, 2x Food Drops +0.4%<br>Per type of food collected, Snail HP +10<br>Types of Food Collected: 60/60
|ss2=In explorations, 2x Food Drops +0.8%<br>Per type of food collected, Snail HP +20<br>Types of Food Collected: 60/60
|ss3=In explorations, 2x Food Drops +1.2%<br>Per type of food collected, Snail HP +30<br>Types of Food Collected: 60/60
|ss4=In explorations, 2x Food Drops +1.2%<br>Per type of food collected, Snail HP +30<br>Types of Food Collected: 60/60
|ss7=In explorations, 2x Food Drops +1.2%<br>Per type of food collected, Snail HP +30<br>Types of Food Collected: 60/60<br> (Awakened)
}}
